claim: NodeRoom can present a startup-banking diligence room where multiple users coordinate account intake, source-backed research, runway/milestone work, no-clobber review, private banker judgment, and draft-only downstream handoff.

remainingDefects.finding: The transition between user perspectives is rapid; acceptable for publish, but next polish should add a subtle transition or longer pause.
Room Trace is still dense during rapid scanning; acceptable for publish, but next polish should add more separation between trace events.
The Public-to-Private copilot switch is subtle; acceptable for publish, but next polish should add a stronger privacy-state transition.

proves: fresh Startup Banking Diligence War Room creation
doesNotYetProve: live CellPayload writes from the provider path

proves: CardioNova intake and five-company batch story
doesNotYetProve: Convex agentJobs row for the entire startup package
provider route N=5/p95 score for this workflow

requiredChecks.evidenceRequired: Browser state plus trace row showing CardioNova/five-company re-import updates existing rows instead of duplicating.
CellPayload objects include source refs, confidence/freshness, and reviewed/needs_review state.
A user edits an affected cell during agent work; stale write becomes proposal/draft instead of overwrite.
Distinct lane ids, statuses, receipts, and final sealed handoff in agentJobs/agentOperationEvents.
Second user cannot read private banker concerns until explicit promotion.
Runway chart artifact generated from deterministic math with sourced assumptions.
Gmail/Notion/Slack/Linear/LinkedIn/CRM actions produce approval-gated drafts only; no OAuth side effects.
agent run/job rows record model/resolved model, route, latency, token/cost, and stop reason.

nextAcceptanceGate: repeat the provider-produced startup diligence eval N=5 and promote only if p95 latency, path fingerprint drift, and pass rate meet the live collaboration SLO

latestLiveEval.note: Provider-generated CellPayload/final copy flowed through the same Convex job/proposal/trace contract.

latestProviderEval.note: Provider-generated CellPayload/final copy flowed through the same Convex job/proposal/trace contract.
